propositions: The diff-scope filter keeps a detector match only when location.file is exactly equal to a changed_files entry, with neither side normalized.
Different spellings of the same file (relative ./, absolute under repo_root, repeated separators, unicode NFC/NFD variants) compare unequal, silently dropping a real high-severity security match.
The fix canonicalizes both location.file and each changed_files entry via relativize-under-repo_root, normpath, and NFC normalization before the membership test.
Symlink/realpath resolution is out of scope because diff-scope paths need not exist on disk; only textual spelling is canonicalized.
Tests verify variant path forms still match their changed-file entry while a genuinely different file not in changed_files still does not match.
